subcodes.first_line: O servant of the True One! Blessed are they who are intoxicated at the feast of "Am I not your Lord?", who are inebriated with the overflowing cup of the Covenant [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده حق خوشا بحال سرمستان بزم الست که از جام سرشار عهد و پیمان مستند و
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @service to others; to the Cause of God
